questions.question: Peter, Janet, Pam, Barbara, Jack, Colin and George comprise what fictional team of child detectives?
What is laid in alternating courses of "stretchers" and "headers"?
What is the top-selling flavour of Aeroplane Jelly?
With which philosophy is the Roman statesman Seneca the Younger associated?
Do the statues (or moai) of Easter Island face inland or out to sea?
Who plays Maggie in the 2023 reboot of the ABC TV sitcom Mother and Son?
What is the meaning of the slang term "catch these hands"?
questions.answer: It is an invitation (joking or otherwise) to fight

questions.question: Name four of the five events included in the ancient Olympic pentathlon.
questions.answer: Footrace, discus throw, javelin throw, long jump, wrestling

questions.question: DXB is the IATA code for which international airport?
The soprano Deborah Cheetham Fraillon is the niece of which Australian country-music legend?
Which is the only letter not to appear in the name of any US state?
Which famous couple met on November 9, 1966, at London's Indica Gallery?
What does it mean if a horse is "barn sour"?
questions.answer: It doesn't want to leave its barn/stable/paddock, and is anxious to return to it

questions.question: Which veteran US television personality's name is an anagram of "nerd amid late TV"?
How did Reuters first send news between Brussels, Belgium and Aachen, Germany?
What is the word, rhyming with "little", for the dot on top of a lower case 'i' or 'j'?
Which of the following is not a Latin-American dance: the salsa, samba or tarantella?
By what name is "looksmaxxer" and TikTok influencer Braden Peters better known?
Which three South American countries does the equator pass through?
Cold Chisel guitarist Ian Moss had a 1989 hit with Tucker's ... what?
Which two Shakespeare characters are code words in the NATO phonetic alphabet?
Corella, Nashi and Packham's Triumph are varieties of which fruit?
What is Pokémon a contraction of?
Which sea is bounded by Bulgaria, Georgia, Romania, Russia, Turkey and Ukraine?
You'll Never Walk Alone is the anthem of which English Premier League football club?
